notes: Fixed a Pathmark Online NameError caused by a missing read_online_tables compatibility wrapper.
Tidied the Pathmark Online beta page so connection/admin controls live in Settings instead of above the main workspace tabs.
Removed redundant general guidance from the Online page and kept practical guidance inside the relevant sections.
Expanded About & Privacy with clearer user-facing Google access, storage, disconnect, GitHub, and Streamlit secrets explanations.
Softened Google Sheets read failures so users see a recovery message rather than raw API details.
